content:
```diff
diff --git a/game/character.py b/game/character.py
index 3a7f2d1..c1e4b7a 100644
--- a/game/character.py
+++ b/game/character.py
@@ -1,6 +1,54 @@
+from enum import Enum, auto
+import random
+
+from game.furniture import FurnitureType
+
 class CharacterState(Enum):
-    IDLE = auto()
-    WORKING = auto()
+    IDLE = auto()
+    WORKING = auto()
 
-class Character:
-    def __init__(self, name):
-        self.name = name
-        self.state = CharacterState.IDLE
-        self.position = (0, 0)
-        self.current_furniture = None
+class Character:
+    def __init__(self, name, position=(0, 0)):
+        self.name = name
+        self.state = CharacterState.IDLE
+        self.position = position
+        self.current_furniture = None
+        self.pose = None  # Current interaction pose string
+        self.workstation = None  # Furniture assigned as workstation
+
+    def set_workstation(self, furniture):
+        """Assign a furniture as workstation."""
+        self.workstation = furniture
+
+    def move_to(self, position):
+        """Move character to a position."""
+        self.position = position
+
+    def interact_with_furniture(self, furniture):
+        """Set pose and position based on furniture type."""
+        self.current_furniture = furniture
+        self.move_to(furniture.position)
+        # Set pose based on furniture type
+        if furniture.furniture_type == FurnitureType.DESK:
+            self.pose = "sitting"
+        elif furniture.furniture_type == FurnitureType.THRONE:
+            self.pose = "sitting"
+        elif furniture.furniture_type == FurnitureType.ANVIL:
+            self.pose = "standing"
+        elif furniture.furniture_type == FurnitureType.WEAPON_RACK:
+            self.pose = "leaning"
+        elif furniture.furniture_type == FurnitureType.BOOKSHELF:
+            self.pose = "reading"
+        else:
+            self.pose = "idle"
+
+    def clear_interaction(self):
+        """Clear current furniture interaction."""
+        self.current_furniture = None
+        self.pose = None
+
+    def wander(self):
+        """Move randomly to simulate wandering."""
+        # Simple random move in a 10x10 grid for example
+        new_x = self.position[0] + random.choice([-1, 0, 1])
+        new_y = self.position[1] + random.choice([-1, 0, 1])
+        self.move_to((new_x, new_y))
+
+    def update(self):
+        """Update character behavior based on state."""
+        if self.state == CharacterState.WORKING and self.workstation:
+            self.interact_with_furniture(self.workstation)
+        elif self.state == CharacterState.IDLE:
+            self.clear_interaction()
+            self.wander()
diff --git a/game/furniture.py b/game/furniture.py
index 5f8a1b2..d4c9e3f 100644
--- a/game/furniture.py
+++ b/game/furniture.py
@@ -1,5 +1,21 @@
-from enum import Enum
-
-class Furniture:
-    def __init__(self, furniture_type, position):
-        self.furniture_type = furniture_type
-        self.position = position
+from enum import Enum, auto
+
+class FurnitureType(Enum):
+    DESK = auto()
+    THRONE = auto()
+    ANVIL = auto()
+    WEAPON_RACK = auto()
+    BOOKSHELF = auto()
+
+class Furniture:
+    def __init__(self, furniture_type, position):
+        self.furniture_type = furniture_type
+        self.position = position
+
+    def __repr__(self):
+        return f"<Furniture {self.furniture_type.name} at {self.position}>"
```
